Document 2: LGBT themes in comics are a relatively new concept, as lesbian, gay, bisexual, and transgender themes and characters were historically omitted intentionally from the content of comic books.

The roller coaster is also the world 's tallest and fastest flying coaster.

topic.name: Video Game Music
topic.description: The documents discuss the soundtracks and musical compositions associated with various video game franchises, highlighting their significance and the composers involved.

Document 1: The music of the Final Fantasy series refers to the soundtracks of the Final Fantasy series of video games
The primary composer of music for the main series was Nobuo Uematsu
Document 2: The music of the Mana series includes soundtracks and arranged albums of music from the series
a 20-disc box set of previously-released albums was produced
Document 3: The Guitar Hero series is a series of music rhythm games
Players match notes that scroll on-screen to colored fret buttons on the controller

topic.name: Rivers of Southern England
topic.description: This topic covers the geographical, historical, and navigational aspects of rivers in Southern England, focusing on their development, usage, and environmental management.

Document 1: The River Rother flows for 35 miles through the English counties of East Sussex and Kent.
The river has been used for navigation since Roman times.
Document 2: The River Rother flows from Empshott in Hampshire to Stopham in West Sussex.
The lower river has been used for navigation.
Document 3: The River Welland is a lowland river in the east of England, some 65 miles long.
Significant improvements were made to the river in the 1660s.

topic.name: Tropical Cyclones and Hurricanes
topic.description: The documents discuss the formation, impact, and meteorological history of various tropical cyclones and hurricanes affecting regions in the Gulf of Mexico and the Pacific.

Document 1: The 1926 Louisiana hurricane caused widespread devastation to the United States Gulf Coast
The hurricane 's strong storm surge at landfall caused extensive damage to coastal regions
Document 2: Tropical Storm Dolly was a short-lived and disorganized tropical cyclone
The storm produced widespread moderate to heavy rain in Mexico
Document 3: Hurricane Juliette was the strongest hurricane and final tropical cyclone of the inactive 1995 Pacific hurricane season
Juliette quickly intensified to major hurricane status
